category_sources: Official ncview homepage describes ncview as a visual browser for netCDF files.
source_facts.description says Visual browser for netCDF format files.
docs_sources: Official quick introduction and tutorial pages are hosted under the author’s UCSD ncview site.
source_facts.homepage is the official ncview page and links source and README information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ncview pages provide source tarballs and documentation, but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official ncview homepage says it displays netCDF files and runs on UNIX/X11.
